description_long: This is a sleek, modern coupe car with a streamlined body and a low, sporty stance. The exterior is predominantly white, featuring smooth, contoured surfaces and subtle detailing around the headlights and taillights. The car has four doors, flush door handles, and a panoramic sunroof, giving it a luxurious and contemporary appearance. The wheels are multi-spoke alloys, and the side mirrors are integrated smoothly into the body. The front grille is wide and distinct, with signature kidney-shaped openings, and the rear features dual exhaust pipes and a subtle lip spoiler. The windows are tinted, and the overall design emphasizes both performance and elegance, typical of high-end urban vehicles.
description: A modern, white coupe car with a streamlined body, four doors, alloy wheels, and a panoramic sunroof, exuding luxury and sportiness.
description_view_0: Rear view showing dual exhaust pipes, taillights, and the panoramic sunroof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, alloy wheels, and the smooth, continuous roofline.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, signature headlights, and contoured hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door arrangement and alloy wheels.
attribute_window_configuration: four-door coupe with three side windows per side
